name: duo-bridge-poc
description: Turns GitLab Duo responses into reviewed file changes on the current branch without requiring a clean working tree.

untrustedWorkspaces.description: Duo Agent can modify workspace files only after the workspace is trusted.

virtualWorkspaces.description: Duo Agent requires a local Git checkout and the Git command-line client.

duoAgent.defaultAllowedPaths.description: Default repository-relative writable paths when no active file is available.

duoAgent.autoIncludeActiveFile.description: Automatically include the active file as complete context and preselect it in the file picker.

duoAgent.maxContextFiles.description: Maximum number of complete files included in a generated prompt.

duoAgent.maxContextCharacters.description: Maximum combined number of characters read from selected context files.

duoAgent.maxCharactersPerFile.description: Maximum characters included from one context file or editor selection.

duoAgent.maxTreeEntries.description: Maximum number of repository paths included in the generated prompt.

duoAgent.maxFilePickerEntries.description: Maximum number of files displayed in the context picker.

duoAgent.maxResponseBytes.description: Maximum UTF-8 size of a copied GitLab Duo response.

duoAgent.maxFileWriteBytes.description: Maximum UTF-8 size of one created or replaced text file.

duoAgent.maxTotalWriteBytes.description: Maximum combined UTF-8 bytes written by one reviewed task.

duoAgent.maxOperations.description: Maximum number of create, replace, or delete changes accepted in one response.

duoAgent.preserveExistingEol.description: Preserve the dominant line ending and UTF-8 BOM of replaced files.

duoAgent.clipboardWaitSeconds.description: How long Duo Agent waits for the GitLab Duo response to be copied.
